steps.title: Recognize that f(x) = 0 means x-intercepts
steps.content: The question asks for how many values of $x$ the function $f(x) = 0$. This is asking us to count how many times the graph crosses the x-axis.

steps.title: Trace the curve left to right and count crossings
steps.content:
Starting from the left side of the graph:
  • Around $x = -4$: the curve crosses the x-axis, moving from above to below
  • Around $x = 0$: the curve crosses the x-axis again, moving from below to above
  • Around $x = 5$: the curve crosses the x-axis a third time, moving from above to below
To the right of $x = 5$, the curve remains below the x-axis and does not cross again. That matches choice C — C is correct.
